stimulus.text: Should we acquire HelioTech for $500M? They have $200M annual revenue growing 15% YoY, a strong engineering team of 150, but significant technical debt in their legacy platform. Our board wants a decision by end of Q2.

convergence_points.theme_label: HelioTech's revenue growth will continue at the current rate.
HelioTech has a strong engineering team of 150.

synthesis.confidence_rationale: Confidence: Low (30.6%). Strong agreement across lenses (59.7%). Moderate evidence (26.0% density). Some unsupported claims penalize confidence.

convergence_points.theme_label: HelioTech's revenue growth slowed to 5% YoY post-acquisition, falling short of expectations.
HelioTech's revenue growth will continue at a similar rate post-acquisition.
The engineering team's capacity to address technical debt is sufficient.
